title: paeonia × suffruticosa var. papaveracea
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa var. papaveracea, commonly known as the peony or tree peony, is a plant species that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa var. papaveracea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
